tools.name: add_asset_to_scene
tools.description: Adds an asset from the AssetDatabase to the Unity scene

assetPath.description: The path of the asset in the AssetDatabase

parentPath.description: The path of the parent GameObject in the hierarchy

parentId.description: The instance ID of the parent GameObject

tools.name: add_package
tools.description: Adds packages into the Unity Package Manager

source.description: The source to use (registry, github, or disk)

packageName.description: The package name to add from Unity registry

version.description: The version to use for registry packages

branch.description: The branch to use for GitHub packages

tools.name: batch_execute
tools.description: Executes multiple tool operations in a single batch request. Reduces network round-trips and enables atomic operations with rollback support.

operations.description: Array of operations to execute sequentially

stopOnError.description: If true, stops execution on the first error

atomic.description: If true, rolls back all operations if any fails

tools.name: create_prefab
tools.description: Creates a prefab with optional MonoBehaviour script and serialized field values

prefabName.description: The name of the prefab to create

tools.name: create_scene
tools.description: Creates a new scene and saves it to the specified path

sceneName.description: The name of the scene to create

folderPath.description: The folder path under Assets to save into

addToBuildSettings.description: Whether to add to Build Settings

makeActive.description: Whether to make the scene active

tools.name: delete_scene
tools.description: Deletes a scene by path or name and removes it from Build Settings

scenePath.description: Full asset path to the scene

tools.name: duplicate_gameobject
tools.description: Duplicates a GameObject in the Unity scene. Can create multiple copies and optionally rename or reparent them.

tools.name: delete_gameobject
tools.description: Deletes a GameObject from the Unity scene. By default also deletes all children.

tools.name: reparent_gameobject
tools.description: Changes the parent of a GameObject. Can move to a new parent or to root level.

newParent.description: Path to new parent. Null for root.

tools.name: get_console_logs
tools.description: Retrieves logs from the Unity console with pagination support

tools.name: get_gameobject
tools.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific GameObject by instance ID, name, or hierarchical path.

idOrName.description: Instance ID, name, or hierarchical path of the GameObject

tools.name: get_scene_info
tools.description: Gets information about the active scene including name, path, dirty state, root object count.

tools.name: load_scene
tools.description: Loads a scene by path or name. Supports additive loading.

scenePath.description: Full asset path to the scene

tools.name: create_material
tools.description: Creates a new material with the specified shader and saves it to the project.

savePath.description: Asset path to save the material

tools.name: assign_material
tools.description: Assigns a material to a GameObject's Renderer component at a specific slot

tools.name: modify_material
tools.description: Modifies properties of an existing material. Supports colors, floats, and textures.

tools.name: get_material_info
tools.description: Gets detailed information about a material including shader and properties.

tools.name: execute_menu_item
tools.description: Executes a Unity menu item by path

tools.name: recompile_scripts
tools.description: Recompiles all scripts in the Unity project.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Runs Unity's Test Runner tests

tools.name: save_scene
tools.description: Saves the current active scene. Optionally saves to a new path.

tools.name: select_gameobject
tools.description: Sets the selected GameObject in the Unity editor

objectPath.description: Path or name of the GameObject

tools.name: send_console_log
tools.description: Sends console log messages to the Unity console

tools.name: move_gameobject
tools.description: Moves a GameObject to a new position. Supports world/local space.

tools.name: rotate_gameobject
tools.description: Rotates a GameObject using Euler angles.

tools.name: scale_gameobject
tools.description: Scales a GameObject. Supports absolute and relative scaling.

tools.name: set_transform
tools.description: Sets a GameObject's transform in one operation.

tools.name: unload_scene
tools.description: Unloads a scene by path or name.

tools.name: update_component
tools.description: Updates component fields on a GameObject or adds it if missing

componentName.description: Component name to update or add

tools.name: update_gameobject
tools.description: Updates properties of a GameObject. Creates it if not found at path.
